name: # SCENARIO <name>: Given <price gate>; When <large market head fires>; Then <stop tail protects helper exposure near the pre-push price>.
# Purpose: run from a second bot to push Kraken demo liquidity and help trigger the main scenario head/tail lifecycle.
# Demo-book rule of thumb observed by operator: each visible level is roughly 7 USD wide with about 200 contracts.
# Quantity guide: 201 ~= one level, 401 ~= two levels, 1401 ~= seven levels, 1601 may jump to the demo sentinels 999999 or 3500.
# Tempo: scheduled helper rows start one minute apart and repeated attempts pause 0.5 minutes, giving roughly 30 seconds between market pushes.
# Tail convention: tType=S- and qAtDpD place a reduce-only stop at the expected pre-push price.
# Example: a 401 buy is expected to lift about 14 USD, so tp=14 places the sell stop about 14 USD below the fill.
# Populate the adversarial private account DB in one shell:
# scripts/kolabidb private start --account-scope advers --api-key-env KRAKEN_FUTURE_DEMO2_API_KEY --api-secret-env KRAKEN_FUTURE_DEMO2_API_SECRET
# Run the adversarial bot in another shell. It shares the default public market DB and uses the isolated adversarial private DBs:

# python -m kolabi.bot run --strategy orders/advers.tsv --account-scope advers --api-key-env KRAKEN_FUTURE_DEMO2_API_KEY --api-secret-env KRAKEN_FUTURE_DEMO2_API_SECRET --max-active-pairs 0 2>&1 | tee logs/advers.log
# Given last/reference price has moved up by at least 10 USD since activation; When crossed; Then buy 1401 at market once and protect helper exposure 49 USD below fill.
# Given the bot is started; When active; Then buy at market twice with 30s pause and protect each helper exposure 14 USD below fill, near the pre-push price.
# Given the bot is started; When active; Then sell at market twice with 30s pause and protect each helper exposure 14 USD above fill, near the pre-push price.
# Given last/reference price has moved up by at least 63 USD since activation; When crossed; Then sell 1401 at market once and protect helper exposure 49 USD above fill.
# Given the bot is started; When active; Then buy through most visible demo liquidity and protect helper exposure roughly 56 USD below fill.
# Given the bot is started; When active; Then sell through most visible demo liquidity and protect helper exposure roughly 56 USD above fill.
